name: Chongqing Jianshe Vehicle System Co., Ltd.
summary: Chongqing Jianshe Vehicle System Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, manufacture, distribution, and sale of motorcycles, auto parts, accessories, and machinery products in China and internationally. Its products include motorcycles engines; and automotive air conditioning compressors. The company is also involved in the research, development, wholesale, retail, and processing of mechanical and electrical products, home appliances, bicycles, and environmental protection products. The company was formerly known as Chongqing Jianshe Motorcycle Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Chongqing Jianshe Vehicle System Co., Ltd. in December 2017. The company was founded in 1889 and is headquartered in Chongqing, China. Chongqing Jianshe Vehicle System Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Chongqing Jianshe mechanical and electrical co., LTD.
